flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at South Seattle College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Seattle College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at South Seattle College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (26.2% vs 33.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Seattle College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
